data.title: Trump Willing To End Iran War Without Strait Of Hormuz Reopening: WSJ
data.description: According to a report by the Wall Street Journal, President Donald Trump has conveyed to his advisors his readiness to conclude the conflict with Iran, even if the Strait of Hormuz stays shut. The news suggests that Trump is open to ending the confrontation with Iran irrespective of the strategic waterway's closure. The report did not specify the source of this information, but it was highlighted in Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: America's 250th Kicks Off with 250,000 Idaho Potatoes in Record-Breaking Display
data.description: In Mitchell, South Dakota, on March 30, 2026, an event marked the United States' 250th birthday by revealing the world's biggest Idaho® potato exhibit. The Idaho Potato Commission (IPC) and County Fair Foods collaborated to construct the display using a staggering 250,000 Idaho potatoes. This exhibit served as a patriotic homage to America.

data.title: GHIT Fund and Thailand Science Research and Innovation to Strengthen Partnership Through Co-Funding Initiative
data.description: On March 30, 2026, a memorandum of understanding (MOU) was signed between the Global Health Innovative Technology (GHIT) Fund and Thailand Science Research and Innovation (TSRI) in Tokyo. This MOU aims to enhance their collaboration by providing co-funding opportunities for research and development projects. This partnership signifies a significant step towards advancing global health initiatives. The agreement seeks to leverage resources for R&D efforts, boosting innovation in the field. This collaboration marks a positive stride in global health, with both entities committed to jointly supporting projects that address critical health challenges.
